rule: All workers must wear helmets at all times on the production floor.
Safety harnesses must be worn when working at heights above 1.5 meters.
Fire extinguishers must remain accessible and pathways must not be blocked.
No unauthorized personnel are allowed in restricted machinery zones.
Chemical-resistant gloves and goggles must be worn when handling hazardous materials.
Smoking is strictly prohibited in all zones of the facility.
Fire-resistant protective vests must be worn in machinery and high-heat zones.
Pressurized containers must be stored away from heat sources and open flames.
Access control systems must be regularly audited and software kept up to date.
All workers must complete PPE training before entering the production floor.
